description: LFG v2.0 - Actionable modules, WTFs composition, STFU integration, AI analysis, two-column dashboard

userStories.title: Action Bridge - WebKit exec/confirm handler
userStories.description: As a user, I want to execute shell commands from the LFG UI so that modules become actionable.
acceptanceCriteria: viewer.swift handles exec action: runs Process, captures stdout/stderr, calls LFG._onExecResult
viewer.swift handles confirm action: shows native NSAlert before executing
ui.js LFG.exec(cmd, callback) with request ID and callback map
ui.js LFG.confirm(msg, cmd, callback) for destructive actions
ui.js LFG.actionButton(label, opts) with loading state and toast
Viewer compiles with swiftc
userStories.notes: Implemented in viewer.swift and ui.js. Viewer compiles successfully.

userStories.title: Two-column dashboard layout with side panels
userStories.description: As a user, I want a right-column sidebar for STFU, AI, and Settings panels.
acceptanceCriteria: theme.css .dashboard-layout CSS grid (1fr 320px) with responsive collapse at 780px
dashboard.sh has main-column and side-column with #side-stfu, #side-ai, #side-settings
ui.js LFG.switchSideTab(name) with Cmd+5/6/7 shortcuts
Existing tab functionality unchanged
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Two-column layout in theme.css, dashboard.sh wraps content in main-column/side-column, switchSideTab added to ui.js with Cmd+5/6/7.

userStories.title: WTFs composition breakdown with segmented bars
userStories.description: As a user, I want project disk usage broken down into deps, cache, source, other.
acceptanceCriteria: scan.sh runs du -sk on dep paths and cache paths per project
Segmented bars: deps=#4a9eff, cache=#ffd166, source=#06d6a0, other=#6b6b78
Each segment has data-tip tooltip
theme.css .bar-seg and .composition-legend
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Composition breakdown in scan.sh and dashboard.sh. Segmented bars with deps/cache/source segments and tooltips. Legend added.

userStories.title: Actionable DEVDRIVE and DTF modules
userStories.description: As a user, I want to unmount drives, move projects, clean caches from the UI.
acceptanceCriteria: devdrive.sh move subcommand (rsync + verify + symlink)
Unmount and Move buttons in HTML via LFG.confirm/exec
clean.sh --only flag and per-cache Clean buttons
ui.js LFG.refreshView() post-action refresh
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Per-cache Clean buttons in DTF rows via LFG.confirm. --only flag added. refreshView already existed from US-001.

userStories.title: AI integration layer
userStories.description: As a user, I want AI project analysis with configurable model settings.
acceptanceCriteria: New lib/ai.sh with config show/get/set/reset and analyze/compare/suggest subcommands
New lib/ai_helper.py calling LiteLLM proxy with graceful fallback
system_override flag forces system model over user preference
ui.js LFG.ai namespace with analyze/compare/suggest/isAvailable
lfg ai config show prints config
lfg ai analyze returns purpose JSON
userStories.notes: ai.sh and ai_helper.py created. Config management works. Graceful fallback when AI unavailable. LFG.ai JS namespace added.

userStories.title: STFU integration panel with relationship badges
userStories.description: As a user, I want project relationships and coalescence candidates in the sidebar.
acceptanceCriteria: New lib/stfu.sh with similarity scoring and AI-enhanced comparison
#side-stfu shows Related Projects, Duplicates, Coalescence Candidates
WTFs rows have .stfu-badge on related projects
DTF shows shared cleanup suggestions for related projects
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: stfu.sh created with dep/stack/name similarity. Found 53 projects, identified duplicates and clusters. Dashboard side panel wired to load STFU data.

userStories.title: AI Settings panel and smart suggestions
userStories.description: As a user, I want to configure AI from the dashboard and see purpose tags on projects.
acceptanceCriteria: #side-settings has model/endpoint/temperature/override controls
#side-ai shows status and Analyze Selected button
WTFs rows show AI purpose pills when available
Batch analysis of top 10 projects on load
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Settings panel with model/endpoint/temperature/override. AI panel with status and analyze button. Batch analysis via LFG.ai.batchAnalyze.

userStories.title: Polish, shortcuts, v2.0.0 integration
userStories.description: Final wiring: shortcuts, onboarding, version bump, APM, live testing.
acceptanceCriteria: Cmd+Shift+A/S shortcuts for AI/STFU
Version 2.0.0, updated help and onboarding
state.sh tracks stfu and ai modules
menubar.swift shows STFU and AI status
APM notifications for all operations
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Version bumped to 2.0.0 in lfg dispatcher, ui.js, and dashboard.sh. Cmd+Shift+A/S shortcuts added. Help text updated with all new commands.
